message:
refactor(core): migrate tokio::spawn/timeout to runtime_compat abstraction layer

Replace direct tokio::spawn calls with crate::runtime_compat::task::spawn
and tokio::time::timeout with crate::runtime_compat::timeout across
distributed, orphan_reaper, and replay modules. This completes the
dual-runtime abstraction so frankenterm-core no longer hard-depends on
tokio in test paths, enabling future runtime flexibility.

Also updates Cargo.toml toon_rust dependency: package name changed from
"toon" to "tru" to match the upstream crate rename.

Files changed:
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/distributed.rs: 6 spawn call sites migrated
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/orphan_reaper.rs: spawn + timeout migrated
- crates/frankenterm-core/src/replay.rs: 1 spawn call site migrated
- Cargo.toml: toon_rust package = "tru"
- Cargo.lock: dependency resolution updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
